name: supermedicine
description: Optional OpenCode add-on for SuperMedicine: one user-facing SuperMedicine agent plus adapter tools, skill documents, and internal role context files layered around the standalone core
author: SuperMedicine contributors

permissions.description: Optional adapter permissions for file I/O, code execution, declared local skill file loading, capability reporting, and orchestrator-backed task dispatch; dangerous tools are checked by the canonical policy before execution
unsupported_native_platform_claims: native OpenCode subagent runtime without injected orchestrator

ai_provider.example_key_policy: Use non-secret-shaped placeholders such as <OPENAI_API_KEY_PLACEHOLDER> in docs; never commit real API keys.
ai_provider.visibility: Only the SuperMedicine user-facing OpenCode agent exposes this provider capability metadata.

user_facing_agents.name: SuperMedicine
user_facing_agents.description: The only platform-visible OpenCode agent for SuperMedicine. Internal α/β/γ/δ roles remain non-user-facing role context documents and capabilities.

install_completeness_model.permission_boundary: Declared tools match OpenCodeAdapter.SUPPORTED_TOOLS; high-risk mutation/execution paths remain policy checked.
install_completeness_model.ai_provider_config_boundary: OpenCode reads provider metadata from installer/runtime/project configuration declarations only; manifests and docs contain no plaintext API keys.

uninstall.ownership_rule: Remove only installer-recorded or explicitly targeted OpenCode artifacts owned by SuperMedicine; do not delete user-owned global OpenCode configuration.

limitations: The SuperMedicine standalone core does not require OpenCode.
Task dispatch requires an injected orchestrator/runtime bridge; otherwise adapter.py returns a structured degraded result with local role context only.
Role markdown files describe non-user-facing SuperMedicine/OpenCode role context and do not by themselves implement native OpenCode subagents.
OpenCode exposes exactly one user-facing agent from this plugin: SuperMedicine.
